title: Anorectal
summary:
Anorectal refers to the region of the anus and the rectum. It is used as a medical adjective referring to e.g. 

Anorectal abscess
Anorectal angle
Anorectal anomalies
Anorectal atresia
Anorectal canal
Anorectal disorder
Anorectal fistula
Anorectal junction
Anorectal manometry
Anorectal sampling reflex
Anorectal varices
Anorectal wart
